feedback.text: Hei, it’s great if you could support the preservation of digital products such as games, films, music and books. The digital world is changing at a fast pace and many of these areas are overlooked, despite large companies exploiting customer confidence. No one has ever expected our digital product to disappear if the service ceases to work. These products have been purchased for the purpose of ownership, not renting. I have already supported the Stop Killing Games project, but I would like to see future legislation giving priority to customer rights.
